title: Smoked Mackerel Pâté
excerpt: Ingredients 160 g smoked mackerel fillets of your choice (about 2 packets) 45 ml creamed horseradish 65 ml crème fraiche or thick sour cream 30 ml lemon juice 15 ml finely grated lemon zest 90 ml melted butter 45 ml finely chopped parsley Method Remove the skin from the mackerel and break into smaller pieces. …
html:
Ingredients

  • 160 g smoked mackerel fillets of your choice (about 2 packets)
  • 45 ml creamed horseradish (horseradish)
  • 65 ml crème fraiche or thick sour cream
  • 30 ml lemon juice
  • 15 ml finely grated lemon zest
  • 90 ml melted butter
  • 45 ml finely chopped parsley

Method

Remove the skin from the mackerel and break it into smaller pieces.

Mix the rest of the ingredients thoroughly and then gently stir in the mackerel pieces.

Place in the fridge to set.

Serves 6 as a starter with toasted ciabatta bread.

To jazz it up: Mix together 1 x 85 g tin of drained smoked mussels, 45 ml chopped capers (or gherkins) and 30 ml chopped spring onion. Sprinkle over the pâté as a garnish and extra texture.

Easy!
